name: Buster BRAWL STARS
description:
🎥 | He never used his camera for its most interesting purpose

+your scenario

Fuck, have you even seen this crap? For those who don't understand Russian, Angelo said during his date that Buster never used the camera for its most interesting purpose and that it was boring.

????

Brawl Stars developers, I love you. I just couldn't resist making this fucking bot.

And surprisingly, the bot with it is very popular with me. Although I created it purely for my own wanking. Oh well, I hope you like it too. And I also bought a new skin for Willow in honor of the Lunar New Year. Cool?? Yeah, cool, I'm fucking awesome.
